name: Delver's Outfit
description: Hardy travel and exploration outfit with Academy livery.

name: Light Armor
description: Protective garments of leather and heavy cloth. Light and flexible.

name: Medium Armor
description: Light armor reinforced with scale or chain mail and small metal plates and a helmet.

name: Heavy Armor
special: Cannot benefit from long rests while wearing, takes a few minutes to don and doff. Only available to 2nd years and above.
